race.comment: BEST COFFEE (2) comes off a deserved victory and looks capable of going on with the job. He maps well from a favourable gate, and a repeat of his latest effort would make him extremely hard to hold out. TREASURER (3)has a strong record at the trip and returns from a freshen-up. If able to reproduce his better form, he rates a major threat. ZEAMAIZE (4) has been racing in stronger company than this and should appreciate the inside draw. A return to his best would see him right in the finish. PRIVALOVA (11) next best.
